appraisal_events.evidence: « le geste de ce bras levé non seulement au mépris du droit des gens, mais du principe de causalité… ce geste créé ex nihilo »; puis son indignation « se traduisant par une entière inamovibilité extérieure » qui ne lui laisse pas « le “jeu” nécessaire » pour répondre.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents the sudden slap from Saint-Loup as an unjustifiable and anti-normative break, and then highlights his rigidity that even prevents him from exchanging a word, which locally diminishes him.

status_effects.explanation: His gesture is described as violent, arbitrary, and against implicit rules, which alters his local estimation.
His indignation renders him unapproachable and mute in conversation, diminishing his dialogic authority in the scene.
